description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Pull Request that runs on every pull request. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest that iterates over multiple languages (csharp, go, python, java, typescript). For each language, set up the corresponding environment (Go, Node.js, Java, Python, .NET), checkout the code, identify changed files specific to the language, list changed files if any, and then build the changed files using a script specific to the language.
